title: Q4 Vitax Fertiliser Sachet, 60 g
features: The premier fertiliser for fruit, vegetables, flowers and roses
The favourite fertiliser of experienced gardeners
Contains all the vital plant foods and trace elements essential for vigorous growth
Abundant flowering and ripening of fruit
description: Product Description Q4 fertiliser 60g sachet Directions 1. Use the Q4 fertiliser for fruit, vegetables, flowers, and roses. 2. Apply it as an outstanding all-purpose fertiliser. 3. Follow the instructions on the package for the correct amount to use for optimal results. 4. Enjoy abundant flowering and ripening of fruit. Safety Warning Always wear gloves and protective clothing when handling. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. In case of accidental contact, rinse thoroughly with water. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and open flames. Do not use near water sources to prevent environmental contamination.
